blocks.content: They started texting that fall. Not instead of anything — still AIM, still face to face — but it was different. Shorter.
you left your history notes at my house
i know i left them there on purpose
it means ill see you tomorrow
He set his phone on his desk and looked at the ceiling.
Eli had said: tell her before you get in. He'd applied to state school and two others. The USC application was sitting half-finished in a folder on his desk. The deadline was December. He had time.
